title: agrostis glaucescens
intro: Agrostis glaucescens, also known as blue bent grass or bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is commonly found in wetlands and meadows. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis glaucescens include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Agrostis glaucescens include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas or taken as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
